description: Available evidence contradicts the claim. Writer must be BLOCKED for this claim or must mark it as not_supported.

input.ifu_text: Device eliminates all risk of post-procedural hematoma.

available_evidence.findings: Hematoma rate: 8% (16/200) in device group vs 12% (24/200) in control. Difference not statistically significant (p=0.12).

input.claim_issue: IFU claims 'eliminates all risk' but evidence shows 8% hematoma rate with non-significant difference from control.

expected_expert_reasoning.reason: Evidence shows 8% hematoma rate and non-significant difference from control (p=0.12). IFU claim of 'eliminates all risk' is contradicted by data.

cer_reasoning_ledger.gap_rationale: Evidence contradicts claim: 8% hematoma rate, p=0.12 vs control. 'Eliminates all risk' is not evidence-supported.
